problem id: d290b24e
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(3) XOR SHR(3)

examples:
  01101100 -> 01101110
  01010101 -> 10100000
  11000011 -> 00000110
  00010001 -> 10001010
  00011010 -> 11010011
  00000100 -> 00100000
  11100111 -> 00100011
  11001011 -> 01000111
  11110110 -> 10101001
  10000001 -> 00011100

query: 00101011
predicted answer: 01011100
